creator: waldeck@hk2.uwaterloo.ca
text:
> Okay. And can you submit a patch to fix this in port?

file:
/usr/ports/databases/gdbm/files/patch-Makefile.in

content:
*** Makefile.in Tue Oct  8 18:09:12 2002
--- Makefile.in.patched Sat Oct 14 15:14:42 2006
***************
*** 15,22 ****
  INSTALL_DATA = @INSTALL_DATA@
  
  # File ownership and group
! BINOWN = bin
! BINGRP = bin
  
  MAKEINFO = makeinfo
  TEXI2DVI = texi2dvi
--- 15,22 ----
  INSTALL_DATA = @INSTALL_DATA@
  
  # File ownership and group
! BINOWN = root
! BINGRP = wheel
  
  MAKEINFO = makeinfo
  TEXI2DVI = texi2dvi

Futher Questions?

Dr. Markus Waldeck
